ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Build a robot using all of your new folding skills.
[ ] Teach others how to fold a paper airplane; have a contest to see whose flies farthest.

[ ] Use your new scoring and folding skills to make cards to share with friends and family.
[ ] Make pinwheels to decorate with or to give as gifts.

[ ] Make stars or snowflakes to decorate your house for a special occasion.
[ ] Use the pleated accordion fold to make a snake.
[ ] Make paper fans to decorate with or to give as gifts.
